title: cephalomanes rigidum
intro: Cephalomanes rigidum, also known as the rigid tail maidenhair, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. The medicinal properties of Cephalomanes rigidum include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Cephalomanes rigidum is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with its leaves being used for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and uses.
